mechanism: Multivariate generalized linear regression correlating individual trait scores with voxel-wise brain morphometry measures across cortical vertices in template space, accounting for covariates via coefficient estimation and multiple comparison correction.

Logistic regression with propensity score matching and sibling fixed-effects estimation comparing treatment-control pairs to identify causal effects on binary educational transitions, with sensitivity analysis for unobserved heterogeneity.

Logistic regression with factorial experimental design and between-subjects random assignment testing interaction effects of time-horizon manipulation on binary choice outcomes, with control variable adjustment.

Voxel-based morphometry using structural image segmentation and registration to template space followed by multiple regression correlating regional gray-matter density with continuous individual-difference variables.

Multinomial logistic regression comparing proportions across repeated-measures trial conditions, testing utility maximization via choice proportions and response time metrics with between-subjects experimental manipulation.

Multivariate analysis of variance and chi-square tests comparing perceived readability and cloze-test accuracy across code-snippet variants with factorial blocking design and between-groups experience stratification.
